name: Grade 11 Reading — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 11 pathway for advanced rhetoric, research, literary analysis, and source evaluation. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 11 knowledge and transferable skills in advanced rhetoric, research, literary analysis, and source evaluation.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
